samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_8bit">
    <description>Implement an 8-bit multiplier based on shifting and adding.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input multiplicand.</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input multiplier.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset.</input>
        <input id="clk">Clock.</input>
        <output id="product" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit output product.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter>shift_counter[3:0]</parameter>
        <parameter>add_counter[2:0]</parameter>
        <parameter>shift_count[3:0]</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <sequential id="shift_counter[3:0]">
            <description>Counter to track the number of shifts performed.</description>
            <update>
                <condition>
                    <negation>
                        <and>
                            <equals>
                                <identifier>rst_n</identifier>
                                <constant>1'b0</constant>
                            </equals>
                            <equals>
                                <identifier>add_counter[2:0]</identifier>
                                <constant>3'b111</constant>
                            </equals>
                        </and>
                    </negation>
                    <then>
                        <sum>
                            <identifier>shift_counter[3:0]</identifier>
                            <constant>4'b0001</constant>
                        </sum>
                    </then>
                    <else>
                        <sum>
                            <identifier>shift_counter[3:0]</identifier>
                            <constant>4'b1111</constant>
                        </sum>
                    </else>
                </condition>
            </update>
        </sequential>
        <sequential id="product[15:0]">
            <description>Product of the two inputs.</description>
            <update>
                <condition>
                    <negation>
                        <and>
                            <equals>
                                <identifier>rst_n</identifier>
                                <constant>1'b0</constant>
                            </equals>
                            <equals>
                                <identifier>add_counter[2:0]</identifier>
                                <constant>3'b111</constant>
                            </equals>
                        </and>
                    </negation>
                    <then>
                        <sum>
                            <identifier>product[15:0]</identifier>
                            <constant>16'b0000000000000001</constant>
                            <identifier>A[7:0]</identifier>
                        </sum>
                    </then>
                    <else>
                        <sum>
                            <identifier>product[15:0]</identifier>
                            <constant>16'b0000000000000000</constant>
                        </sum>
                    </else>
                </condition>
            </update>
        </sequential>
        <sequential id="add_counter[2:0]">
            <description>Counter to track the number of bits processed in the multiplier.</description>
            <update>
                <condition>
                    <negation>
                        <and>
                            <equals>
                                <identifier>rst_n</identifier>
                                <constant>1'b0</constant>
                            </equals>
                            <equals>
                                <identifier>add_counter[2:0]</identifier>
                                <constant>3'b111</constant>
                            </equals>
                        </and>
                    </negation>
                    <then>
                        <sum>
                            <identifier>add_counter[2:0]</identifier>
                            <constant>3'b001</constant>
                        </sum>
                    </then>
                    <else>
                        <sum>
                            <identifier>add_counter[2:0]</identifier>
                            <constant>3'b111</constant>
                        </sum>
                    </else>
                </condition>
            </update>
        </sequential>
    </logic_description>
    <task>
        <description>Shift the multiplicand left by one bit.</description>
        <parameter_description>
            <parameter>shift_counter[3:0]</parameter>
            <parameter>product[15:0]</parameter>
        </parameter_description>
        <implementation>
            <if>
                <equals>
                    <identifier>rst_n</identifier>
                    <constant>1'b0</constant>
                </equals>
                <then>
                    <sequential>
                        <identifier>shift_counter[3:0]</identifier>
                        <description>Counter to track the number of shifts performed.</description>
                        <update>
                            <condition>
                                <negation>
                                    <and>
                                        <equals>
                                            <identifier>rst_n</identifier>
                                            <constant>1'b0</constant>
                                        </equals>
                                        <equals>
                                            <identifier>add_counter[2:0]</identifier>
                                            <constant>3'b111</constant>
                                        </equals>
                                    </and>
                                </negation>
                                <then>
                                    <sum>
                                        <identifier>shift_counter[3:0]</identifier>
                                        <constant>4'b0001</constant>
                                    </sum>
                                </then>
                                <else>
                                    <sum>
                                        <identifier>shift_counter[3:0]</identifier>
                                        <constant>4'b1111</constant>
                                    </sum>
                                </else>
                            </condition>
                        </update>
                    </sequential>
                </then>
            </if>
        </implementation>
    </task>
    <task>
        <description>Perform addition of the multiplicand and the product.</description>
        <parameter_description>
            <parameter>add_counter[2:0]</parameter>
            <parameter>product[15:0]</parameter>
        </parameter_description>
        <implementation>
            <if>
                <equals>
                    <identifier>rst_n</identifier>
                    <constant>1'b0</constant>
                </equals>
                <then>
                    <sequential>
                        <identifier>product[15:0]</identifier>
                        <description>Product of the two inputs.</description>
                        <update>
                            <condition>
                                <negation>
                                    <and>
                                        <equals>
                                            <identifier>rst_n</identifier>
                                            <constant>1'b0</constant>
                                        </equals>
                                        <equals>
                                            <identifier>add_counter[2:0]</identifier>
                                            <constant>3'b111</constant>
                                        </equals>
                                    </and>
                                </negation>
                                <then>
                                    <sum>
                                        <identifier>product[15:0]</identifier>
                                        <constant>16'b0000000000000001</constant>
                                        <identifier>A[7:0]</identifier>
                                    </sum>
                                </then>
                                <else>
                                    <sum>
                                        <identifier>product[15:0]</identifier>
                                        <constant>16'b0000000000000000</constant>
                                    </sum>
                                </else>
                            </condition>
                        </update>
                    </sequential>
                </then>
            </if>
        </implementation>
    </task>
    <task>
        <description>Shift the multiplicand left by one bit.</description>
        <parameter_description>
            <parameter>add_counter[2:0]</parameter>
        </parameter_description>
        <implementation>
            <if>
                <equals>
                    <identifier>rst_n</identifier>
                    <constant>1'b0</constant>
                </equals>
                <then>
                    <sequential>
                        <identifier>add_counter[2:0]</identifier>
                        <description>Counter to track the number of shifts performed.</description>
                        <update>
                            <condition>
                                <negation>
                                    <and>
                                        <equals>
                                            <identifier>rst_n</identifier>
                                            <constant>1'b0</constant>
                                        </equals>
                                        <equals>
                                            <identifier>add_counter[2:0]</identifier>
                                            <constant>3'b111</constant>
                                        </equals>
                                    </and>
                                </negation>
                                <then>
                                    <sum>
                                        <identifier>add_counter[2:0]</identifier>
                                        <constant>3'b001</constant>
                                    </sum>
                                </then>
                                <else>
                                    <sum>
                                        <identifier>add_counter[2:0]</identifier>
                                        <constant>3'b111</constant>
                                    </sum>
                                </else>
                            </condition>
                        </update>
                    </sequential>
                </then>
            </if>
        </implementation>
    </task>
    <implementation>
        <description>Implement the multiplication operation using shifting and adding.</description>
        <sequential>
            <identifier>shift_counter[3:0]</identifier>
            <description>Counter to track the number of shifts performed.</description>
            <update>
                <condition>
                    <negation>
                        <and>
                            <equals>
                                <identifier>rst_n</identifier>
                                <constant>1'b0</constant>
                            </equals>
                            <equals>
                                <identifier>add_counter[2:0]</identifier>
                                <constant>3'b111</constant>
                            </equals>
                        </and>
                    </negation>
                    <then>
                        <sum>
                            <identifier>shift_counter[3:0]</identifier>
                            <constant>4'b0001</constant>
                        </sum>
                    </then>
                    <else>
                        <sum>
                            <identifier>shift_counter[3:0]</identifier
